response:
[[source]]  
[[the function is designed to calculate the sum of squares and the product of cubes for a list of integers]]  
[[the first element of the output is the sum of squares of all elements in the list]]  
[[the second element is the product of the cubes of all elements in the list]]  
[[if the list is empty, the sum of squares is null and the product of cubes is 1]]  
[[the function returns a pair of integers (sum, product) as the result]]  
[***]  
[[the function handles the case where the list is empty by returning (0, 1)]]  
[[the sum of squares is calculated by squaring each element and summing them]]  
[[the product of cubes is calculated by raising each element to the power of 3 and multiplying them]]  
[[the function uses a loop to iterate through each element in the list]]  
[[the loop computes the sum of squares and the product of cubes for each element]]
